P

password - Variable in class model.User
User's password (non-empty string)
Person - Class in model
Person pojo: to represent people/ancestors in the database
Person(String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class model.Person
 
Person(String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class model.Person
 
PersonDao - Class in dataaccess
Handles all database operations for persons
PersonDao() - Constructor for class dataaccess.PersonDao
 
personID - Variable in class model.Event
ID of person to which this event belongs
personID - Variable in class model.Person
Unique identifier for this person (non-empty string)
personID - Variable in class model.User
Unique Person ID assigned to this user's generated Person object (non-empty string)
PersonIDRequest - Class in request
Returns the single person object with the specified ID
PersonIDRequest() - Constructor for class request.PersonIDRequest
 
PersonIDResult - Class in result
Reports success or failure
PersonIDResult() - Constructor for class result.PersonIDResult
 
PersonIDService - Class in service
Handles the functionality of retrieving of a single person
PersonIDService() - Constructor for class service.PersonIDService
 
PersonRequest - Class in request
Returns ALL family members of the current user (user is taken from the auth token)
PersonRequest() - Constructor for class request.PersonRequest
 
PersonResult - Class in result
Reports success or failure
PersonResult() - Constructor for class result.PersonResult
 
PersonService - Class in service
Handles the functionality of retrieving all family members
PersonService() - Constructor for class service.PersonService
